Nijandland is a country in the shape of a 2-Dimensional grid ‘GRID’ with ‘N’ rows and ‘M’ columns. Each point in the grid has some cost associated with it.

Find a path from top left i.e. (0, 0) to the bottom right i.e. (N-1, M-1) which minimizes the sum of the cost of all the path. You need to tell the minimum sum of cost path.

You can only move down or right at any point in time.

int minSumPath(vector<vector<int>> grid) {}
// Write your code here.

Problem Statement: Find a path from top left to bottom right (i.e. "M", "N", "1") which minimizes the sum of the cost of all the numbers along the path.

Note: You can only move down or right at any point in time.

Input Format: The first line contains an integer "T" denoting the number of test cases. The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers "N" and "M" representing the number of rows and number of columns in the grid, respectively.

`NinjaLand is a country in the shape of a 2-Dimensional grid, with N rows and M columns. Each point in the grid has some cost associated with it.`
`Find a path from top left (0, 0) to the bottom right (N-1, M-1) which minimizes the sum of the cost of all the numbers along the path.`
`You need to tell the minimum sum of that path.`
`Note: You can only move down or right at any point in time.`
`Input Format:`
`int f(int a
